headline: Quiet Monday with no meetings, emails, or Slack activity — use the open calendar to drive progress on the 'no ground truth' evals design doc (AE-1079) and fix broken Salesforce/Snowflake integrations.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce auth credentials (SALESFORCE_* env vars) so escalation data flows again
quick_wins.why: You're flying blind on customer escalations; this is a config fix

quick_wins.task: Fix Snowflake password env var so metrics dashboard populates
quick_wins.why: No product metrics available until this is resolved; blocks your ability to report on evals adoption and agents in production

must_make_progress.task: Draft or advance design doc for AE-1079: Generated evaluations — clarify no ground truth
must_make_progress.why: Only active Jira ticket; evals is a key 26.4 deliverable per OKRs and ties into the broader Agents initiative; no due date means it could slip indefinitely without focused effort

must_communicate_with.about: Align on approach for generated evaluations without ground truth — get their technical input before finalizing design doc
Check if evals enablement plan needs the no-ground-truth design doc as a dependency

must_report_status.note: Next bi-weekly TR likely coming soon; ensure your section is current

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into customer escalations or high-priority cases. Fix immediately.
Snowflake metrics integration is down (empty password) — no product telemetry or funnel data available. Fix immediately.
AE-1079 has no due date set — risk of indefinite drift on a key evals deliverable. Consider setting a target date today.
OKR page references March data needing update (Dec/Jan/Feb shown) — April data should be queued once Snowflake is restored.

outcomes.business_impact: No business-impacting activity captured yet today; restoring Salesforce and Snowflake access is the highest-leverage action to regain situational awareness on escalations and adoption.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption data is unavailable due to broken Snowflake integration; advancing the no-ground-truth design doc (AE-1079) is the primary adoption-driving work in progress.

slack_summary: Quiet Monday: no meetings, no emails, no Slack activity — a good deep-work day. Top priority is making real progress on the 'Generated evaluations — no ground truth' design doc (AE-1079), which ties directly to the 26.4 evals deliverable. Also critical: fix broken Salesforce and Snowflake credentials so you can see escalations and product metrics again. Zero meetings today.
